Phase-7.NAME: User device management and device-bound provisioning
Phase-7.goal: Expose device management APIs and update config delivery to be device-aware.
Phase-7.step-1: M-022: Add device CRUD APIs (list, create, revoke, rotate).
Phase-7.step-2: M-009/M-022: Update dashboard for per-device config delivery.
Phase-7.step-3: M-021/M-022: Enforce plan limits before provisioning, ensure revoke frees slot, rotate preserves logical device.
